narrative:
Lyndhurst City has 10,719 registered voters, with 50.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 13.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 36.6%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 23.4 percentage points.
